pfsense-reachable-drift declared-deny custody check #1 (2026-06-24, gold finding, blocked-only landed): commit c65bc98 (core declared_deny_probe.rs + transport declared_deny_transport.rs + CLI + doc). Declaration-vs-observation CUSTODY test, NOT firewall-correctness. Source typing: loaded block rule = pfSenseDeclaration; counters = pfSenseRuntimeReport (never an independent observation); NQ probe = ObservedReachability. Asymmetry: only a SUBJECT got-through (real handshake) is the unambiguous contradiction; a blocked subject is admissible only with a passing CONTROL (egress proof); a block-return RST is not a got-through; absent rule = cannot_testify, never 'allowed'. Ladder: unknown_custody_policy_surface / cannot_testify_declared_policy_absent / _probe_target_unbound / _vantage_unbound / declared_deny_probe_inconclusive / declared_deny_observed_reachable (contradiction) / declared_deny_observed_blocked (corroborated). Read-only discovery: WAN igc0 + LAN igc1 only (no guest VLAN; sushi-k-lan is the only vantage); NO IDS/IPS installed (low perturbation); found USER_RULE: pfB_PRI1_v4 (block return quick on igc1 to <pfB_PRI1_v4>, 17007 entries, 3.19M evals/8 blocked/0 states). LIVE blocked-only read from sushi-k-lan: rule present+custodied, control 1.1.1.1:443 reached (egress proven), subject DELIBERATELY UNBOUND -> cannot_testify_probe_target_unbound. OPERATOR-DIRECTED: do NOT SYN a malware-blocklist member to make the specimen spicy; active subject probe PARKED for a scratch/lab firewall + controlled deny rule + benign target (e.g. 8.8.8.8) + captured teardown. Receipts gitignored under runs/declared-deny/ (only rule declaration/table-name/counters, never member IPs; fixtures TEST-NET). cargo test -p nq-monitor EXIT=0, 0 warnings. Receipt: 2026-06-24T1735Z.declared-deny-custody.json.
